# Q3 Investment Summary

Blackrock manages over $9 trillion in assets globally [[corpus:chunk-001]]. The firm reported record earnings in Q3 2024 [[corpus:chunk-002]]. Their flagship fund delivered returns of 12% year-over-year [[corpus:chunk-003]]. The management team expects growth to continue through 2025 [[corpus:chunk-004]]. Recent regulatory changes have impacted their European operations significantly [[corpus:chunk-005]].
